direction.summary: VoEx rebounded into the Inhibition Zone and DLPs are ramping up; bull run expected to continue near-term despite bearish hedging environment and GTM.

direction.quote: Overall, bullish outlooks until VoEx decides to journey back south again.

direction.summary: Erratic VoEx, unsupportive hedging environments, negative influence distributions, and weak DLP growth all point to a red week with more downside.

direction.summary: Officially still bullish-until-proven-otherwise, but data (MWGSC bearish, GTM positive, weak DLPs, erratic VoEx) are migrating toward a potentially significant downside.
direction.conditions: A VoEx Spike or VoEx Divergence ends the bullish stance; the longer instability persists, the larger the expected retraction.
direction.quote: until there is a VoEx Spike or Divergence, the official outlook is anxiously bullish.

notes: Author explicitly torn: 'bullish until proven otherwise all the while the data are becoming both otherwise and ominously otherwise.'

direction.conditions: Timing uncertain: downside initiates only once VoEx migrates out of the Inhibition Zone; author is watching rather than fully positioned.
